sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me look at the history of successful moves more carefully
# I'll check the transitions to see what clicks worked

for t in transitions:
    if t.after_frame.level == 2:
        seg_before = t.before_frame.segmentation
        seg_after = t.after_frame.segmentation
        
        # Find orange position before and after
        orange_before = None
        orange_after = None
        for n in seg_before['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] > 5:
                orange_before = (sum(b[0] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary']),
                               sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary']))
        for n in seg_after['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] > 5:
                orange_after = (sum(b[0] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary']),
                              sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary']))
        
        if orange_before and orange_after and orange_before != orange_after:
            print(f"Action: {t.action}, Orange moved from {orange_before} to {orange_after}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Sometimes clicking on the purple object (41,49) moves the orange object.
